titleStmt.title: SII 38.117: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 117. (A.R. No. 117 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravattigaḷ Vijayagaṇḍagōpāla Year: 10, Kaṉṉi, ba. di. 5, Saturday, Pūsam = 1260 A.D. Other details are irregular.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of ninety cows and two rams to burn a perpetual lamp to the deity at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr at Puḻar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷamaṇḍalam by Perumāḷ Nāchchi, the senior queen of the prince Pañchanedivāṇaṉ Nīlagaṅgaraiyar.
Two shepherds of Tribhuvanaperun-teruvu, Āchchaṉ and Perumāḷkōṉ Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyāṉ received the above gift and agreed to measure out ninety nāḻi of ghee every year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10
vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiru
voṟṟiyūruṭaiyaṉāyaṉārkku piḷḷaiyār pañcanetivāṇaṉ nilakaṅka
raiyar muttanampirāṭṭiyār perumāḷ nācciyeṉ kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcatti nāḷ vai
tta tirunantāviḷakku Onṟukku viṭṭa cemmari veḷḷāṭṭu toṇṇūṟum ka
ṭā yiraṇṭum viṭṭatu yivvāṭukaḷ kaikkoṇṭāṉ tirupuvaṉapperunta
teru maṉṟāṭikaḷil Āccaṉum perumāḷkkoṉ tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṉum
Ivviruvom kaikkoṇṭa cāvāmuvāpperāṭu Ākakoṇṭu Āṇ
ṭu toṟum Aḷakkum celavu nāḻiyāl ney toṇṇūṟṟu (pa) nāḻi Iṉ ney
toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum candrādityavarai Aḷakka kaṭavom Ivviru vom I
tu śrīmāheśvarara[kṣai]
Digital edition of SII 38.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
